headline: Chip Gear Spending Shows No Signs Of Slowing, Analyst Says
summary: Semiconductor equipment stocks rose Tuesday after investment bank Barclays raised its estimates for chip gear spending this year and next.

raw.headline: Chip Gear Spending Shows No Signs Of Slowing, Analyst Says
raw.summary: Semiconductor equipment stocks rose Tuesday after investment bank Barclays raised its estimates for chip gear spending this year and next.

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading higher, as sentiment may be aided by Micron Technology's DRAM and NAND partnership with Applied Materials, along with Taiwan Semiconductor's strong early 2026 sales data. Sector sentiment may also be boosted by remarks from President Trump suggesting the Middle East conflict could end soon, easing inflation and supply-chain concerns.
